title: pouteria excelsa
intro: Pouteria excelsa, also known as the Yellow Sap or Yellow Heart, is a tropical tree native to the Caribbean and Central America, valued for its distinctive yellow sap and medicinal properties. The plant's bark, leaves, and sap are used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The medicinal properties of Pouteria excelsa are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that promote overall health and well-being.
